q.en: Who is the boy whose sweaty map leads his friends astray on the way to the baseball game?
q.zh: 是哪个男孩因为手中被汗水晕开的地图，导致朋友们在去棒球场的路上迷了路？

options.en: Miguel Ventura
options.zh: 米格尔·文图拉

options.en: Trevon
options.zh: 特雷文

options.en: Leo
options.zh: 利奥

options.en: Teresa
options.zh: 特蕾莎

explain.en: The book opens with Miguel pedaling hard while glancing at a map drawn on his palm; when the ink washes away, he and his friends Trevon and Leo get lost.
explain.zh: 书开头是米格尔奋力蹬车，看着画在掌心里的地图；墨迹被汗水晕开后，他和朋友特雷文、利奥一起迷了路。

q.en: Why could Miguel no longer read the map he had drawn to find the baseball field?
q.zh: 米格尔为什么再也看不清他画好用来找棒球场的地图了？

options.en: The moisture from his sweating hand erased almost all of the ink lines.
options.zh: 他手心出的汗把墨线几乎全部晕开了。

options.en: His bicycle broke down and he dropped it in a puddle.
options.zh: 他的自行车坏了，地图掉进了水坑。

options.en: A storm washed the road signs away.
options.zh: 一场暴风雨把路牌冲没了。

options.en: He had never actually drawn a map at all.
options.zh: 他其实根本没画过地图。

explain.en: The text says 'The moisture had erased almost all the ink-drawn lines' on Miguel's palm as the sun set and the stars had not yet appeared.
explain.zh: 文中写道：随着太阳落山、星星还没出来，米格尔掌心的'汗水把墨线几乎全部晕开了'。

q.en: Which classic book does Miguel magically enter through his great-grandpa Gallardo's magic books?
q.zh: 米格尔通过曾祖父加拉尔多留下的魔法书，神奇地进入了哪本经典著作？

options.en: Black Beauty, by Anna Sewell
options.zh: 安娜·休厄尔所著的《黑骏马》

options.en: The Velveteen Rabbit
options.zh: 《绒布小兔》

options.en: Treasure Island
options.zh: 《金银岛》

options.en: Cinderella
options.zh: 《灰姑娘》

explain.en: Miguel finds a new book, Black Beauty, with a golden star on its cover, and is transported into the story of the horse; the note says it is inspired by Anna Sewell's Black Beauty.
explain.zh: 米格尔找到一本封面嵌着金星的新书《黑骏马》，并进入了这匹马的故事；书末说明它取材于安娜·休厄尔的《黑骏马》。

q.en: In the horse adventure, why must Black Beauty race through the night to reach Dr. White?
q.zh: 在马的冒险里，黑骏马为什么必须连夜飞奔去请怀特医生？

options.en: To fetch the doctor and save the life of the owner's sick wife (mistress).
options.zh: 为了去请医生，挽救主人病重妻子（女主人）的性命。

options.en: To deliver a birthday present to a child.
options.zh: 去给一个孩子送生日礼物。

options.en: To win a horse race at the county fair.
options.zh: 去县集市上赢一场赛马。

options.en: To escape a forest fire.
options.zh: 为了躲避森林大火。

explain.en: A man in a tuxedo tells the rider John, 'Our mistress's life depends upon it,' so Black Beauty must reach Dr. White to save the owner's wife.
explain.zh: 穿礼服的男子对骑手约翰说'女主人的性命全靠它了'，所以黑骏马必须找到怀特医生去救女主人。

q.en: What happens to Dr. White's glasses when Black Beauty slips and falls down the rocky ridge?
q.zh: 当黑骏马在岩石山脊上打滑摔下去时，怀特医生的眼镜怎么了？

options.en: The lenses fall out in the crash and he cannot see a thing.
options.zh: 镜片在坠落中掉了出来，他什么都看不见了。

options.en: They crack but he can still read with them.
options.zh: 镜片裂了，但他还能戴着看东西。

options.en: He had left them safely at home.
options.zh: 他把眼镜安稳地留在了家里。

options.en: The horse accidentally stepped on them and crushed them.
options.zh: 马不小心踩上去把它们踩碎了。

explain.en: After the fall Dr. White says, 'I lost my glasses in the fall; I can't see a thing!' and then discovers the lenses had fallen out.
explain.zh: 摔下后怀特医生说'我在坠落中弄丢了眼镜，我什么都看不见了！'随后发现镜片已经脱落。

q.en: How does the blind Black Beauty manage to find the way home through the dark night?
q.zh: 双目失明的黑骏马是如何在黑夜里找到回家路的？

options.en: He follows a starlit stream that leads to the lake at the manor, then turns right at the fork.
options.zh: 他顺着映着星光的小溪，找到庄园旁的湖，再在岔路口向右转。

options.en: He simply follows the sound of Dr. White's voice down any road.
options.zh: 他只是顺着怀特医生的声音随便走。

options.en: He uses a paper map that the doctor carries in his bag.
options.zh: 他用医生包里带的纸质地图。

options.en: He follows the scent of another horse that went before them.
options.zh: 他循着前面另一匹马的气味走。

explain.en: Remembering the golden star, Black Beauty sees the stars reflected in a stream; 'The stream ended in a lake at the manor,' so he follows the water and turns right at the fork.
explain.zh: 想起金星后，黑骏马看到小溪里映着的星光；'小溪尽头是庄园旁的湖'，于是他顺着水流，在岔路口向右转。

q.en: After Miguel returns to the loft, what does Leo discover about the 'map' in his backpack?
q.zh: 米格尔回到阁楼后，利奥发现自己背包里的'地图'是怎么回事？

options.en: He had turned in the real map to school instead of his math homework.
options.zh: 他把真正的地图交给了学校，结果交错了，本该交的是数学作业。

options.en: The Black Cobras had stolen the map.
options.zh: 黑眼镜蛇队把地图偷走了。

options.en: Trevon had drawn a wrong map on purpose.
options.zh: 特雷文故意画错了地图。

options.en: A dog had eaten the map.
options.zh: 狗把地图吃掉了。

explain.en: Leo says, 'I must have turned in the map instead of my homework!' when he pulls a yellow sheet of paper from his pack.
explain.zh: 利奥从包里掏出一张黄纸时说：'我一定是把地图当作业交上去了！'

q.en: In this book, what does the word 'shale' mean?
q.zh: 在这本书中，'shale'（页岩）一词是什么意思？

options.en: A kind of sedimentary rock formed from compacted mud, clay, or silt.
options.zh: 一种由压实泥沙或粉砂形成的沉积岩。

options.en: A type of horse saddle.
options.zh: 一种马鞍。

options.en: A pattern of stars in the sky.
options.zh: 天空中的一种星象图案。

options.en: A tool used for finding directions.
options.zh: 一种用来辨别方向的工具。

explain.en: The glossary defines 'shale' as 'a kind of sedimentary rock formed from compacted mud, clay, or silt,' which is what made Black Beauty slip.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 shale 定义为'由压实泥沙或粉砂形成的沉积岩'，正是它让黑骏马滑倒了。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To entertain readers with a fictional adventure inspired by the classic Black Beauty.
options.zh: 用一个取材于《黑骏马》的经典虚构冒险来娱乐读者。

options.en: To teach readers how to ride a horse.
options.zh: 教读者如何骑马。

options.en: To give scientific facts about the stars.
options.zh: 提供关于星星的科学事实。

options.en: To convince readers to play baseball.
options.zh: 劝说读者去打棒球。

explain.en: The note explains it is a continuing fictional series 'inspired by Anna Sewell's Black Beauty,' showing the book is a made-up adventure for enjoyment.
explain.zh: 书末说明这是'取材于安娜·休厄尔《黑骏马》'的系列虚构故事，可见本书是为阅读乐趣而写的虚构冒险。

q.en: What reminder helps Black Beauty think of using the stars and water to guide the doctor home?
q.zh: 是什么提醒让黑骏马想到借助星星和水把医生带回家？

options.en: The golden star he had found inlaid on the cover of the book.
options.zh: 他在书封面上发现的那颗金星。

options.en: A loud shout from Dr. White.
options.zh: 怀特医生的大声呼喊。

options.en: A map hidden inside the saddle.
options.zh: 藏在马鞍里的一张地图。

options.en: The rising of the full moon.
options.zh: 满月的升起。

explain.en: When lost at the fork, 'that's when I remembered the golden star that I'd found with the book,' which leads him to notice the starlit stream.
explain.zh: 在岔路口迷路时，'我这才想起随书找到的那颗金星'，这让他注意到映着星光的小溪。

prompt.en: The book mixes a modern problem (getting lost with friends) with a classic horse adventure. Which challenge was harder to overcome — Miguel's trouble reading a sweaty map, or Black Beauty's struggle to guide a blind doctor home through the dark — and why?
prompt.zh: 这本书把现代问题（和朋友们一起迷路）与一匹马的经典冒险交织在一起。哪件事更难克服——米格尔看不清被汗水晕开的地图，还是黑骏马在黑夜中引导失明的医生回家？为什么？

en: Think about how Miguel's ink map was erased by sweat and the stars had not yet come out.
Consider how Black Beauty used his night vision and the starlit stream to lead Dr. White safely home.
zh: 想想米格尔掌心的墨迹被汗水晕开，而星星还没出来的情形。
思考黑骏马如何借助夜视能力和映着星光的小溪，把怀特医生安全地带回家。
